title: Hide Names
description: Hide player nametags by pressing a single button.
body:
![Hide Names](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db4b06ce661590a9e7a46b6bcbff566ca3ced079.png)

Hide player nametags instantly with one key. Clean screen, better focus, less clutter. Client-side only: nothing is changed on the server or for other players’ clients. --- ### ✨ Why this mod? - Cleaner visuals in PvP and crowded servers - Better immersion with less UI noise - Instant toggle while playing --- ## ⚡ Features - Toggle player nametags on/off in real time - Default keybind: `G` - Lightweight and client-side only - Modern Fabric setup, no extra bloat --- ### 💬 Controls | Input | Action | |--------|--------| | **G** | Toggle player nametags (default) | Rebind in **Options → Controls** like any other key. --- ### 🛠️ Compatibility - **Platform:** Fabric (client) - **Game:** Java Edition **1.18.2** through **26.1.x** - **Dependencies:** Fabric Loader + Fabric API --- ### 💙 Perfect for Survival · SMP · minigames · crowded hubs · stream-friendly sessions
